date_block.method: sample observed ETH-date blocks with replacement; preserve chronological trade order within each sampled block; sample the same number of blocks as observed

month_block.method: sample observed month blocks with replacement; preserve chronological trade order within each sampled block; sample the same number of month blocks as observed

warning_labels.LOSS_RISK_WATCH: resampled probability of ending below starting capital is at least 10%
warning_labels.DD10_WATCH: resampled probability of maximum drawdown at least 10% is at least 10%
warning_labels.DD20_WATCH: resampled probability of maximum drawdown at least 20% is at least 5%
warning_labels.DD30_WATCH: resampled probability of maximum drawdown at least 30% is at least 1%

next_decision: Describe the risk/cost trade-off and identify material tail-risk warnings. Do not select a production risk level from the historical sample.
